★★★★★ heidiejanzen · Apr 2026
👨‍👩‍👧 Family SUV
When looking for the best Hyundai dealership in Winnipeg, google reviews said this dealership was the best. From the moment I reached out to them to the evening I drove off the lot with our 2026 Palisade I couldn’t have agreed more with Google. Even through the stopsale interruption of my purchase and waiting for my actual vehicle to come into the dealership, communication was great. Always an easy text away with questions and concerns I may have had. I never felt that I was an inconvenience

★★★★ legrasguy · Feb 2026
👨‍👩‍👧 Family SUV🪄 Smooth & Easy
Experience for most part was positive. Our salesperson was professional and extremely helpful. He did a thorough run through of the vehicle's features. The only big negative was the less than professional behaviour of one of the finance manager's who tried to get us into a finance agreement we didn't want so he could receive a commission. As a result we insisted on having another person handle our sale. The day we picked up our vehicle went relatively smoothly.
